description: Merge conflict or non-fast-forward on reconcile — STEP 0.1 fires HALT.
expected_result: HALT — non-fast-forward or conflict against origin/main

expected_signal.halt_message_contains: Merge conflict or non-fast-forward against origin/main

load_bearing_assertion: STEP 0.0 passes (not master). git merge origin/main --ff-only fails (non-ff or conflict). Orchestrator emits HALT: 'Merge conflict or non-fast-forward against origin/main. Resolve manually, then re-run.' Frontier-scan not reached.
separates_from_defect_by: no-auto-reconcile defect skips STEP 0.1 entirely — orchestrator proceeds to frontier-scan on a dirty/unreconciled tree. Golden: HALT fires on non-fast-forward.
halt_message_template: Merge conflict or non-fast-forward against origin/main. Resolve manually, then re-run.
